bio:
I'm a Computer Science student who builds production-grade web applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Supabase. My projects range from Kitbase - a privacy-first tools platform with 20+ browser-based utilities - to RoverNote, a social travel journaling SaaS.
I also have 5 accepted IEEE and ICCIT publications in deep learning, computer vision, and environmental ML.
headline: MERN Stack Developer
